summary: Frontend testing of Employee ID Card fix and page load bugs. All P0 bugs are FIXED: 1) Employee ID card now shows valid employee_code (EMP0001, EMP0002, EMP0003) with QR codes - not N/A. 2) Delete Employee modal no longer appears unexpectedly on page load. 3) No TypeErrors or ReferenceErrors on Dashboard, Employees, Training Center, Connect Hub, or Billing pages.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: showDeleteConfirm state now initialized with null (line 84 EmployeesPage.js) - prevents unwanted modal on page load
VERIFIED: Backend /api/employees/{id}/id-card endpoint auto-generates employee_code if missing (lines 5259-5279 server.py)
VERIFIED: EmployeeIDCard.js correctly displays employee_code and QRCodeSVG when data is present
context_for_next_testing_agent: All employee ID card features working correctly. Employees Rahul Sharma (EMP0001), Priya Patel (EMP0002), Amit Kumar (EMP0003), Neha Singh, Vikram Reddy all have valid employee codes and QR codes. Delete modal bug fixed.
